form.formComment: Last start 12th over 2700m at Vire, beaten 72m by El Dorado Bar in 6-8yo euro open restricted race on March 18 at $43. At the run before game effort when 2nd over 2900m at Amiens, beaten 29m by Jihere Du Poret in 7-10yo euro open on March 4 at $4.60. Wasn't at his best last time - can improve.

form.formComment: Last start 8th over 2300m at Marseille-Borely, well beaten by Kelmec in 6-10yo race on March 25 at $122. At his previous start good run when 2nd over 2925m at Cagnes-sur-Mer, beaten 14m by Koala in 5-11yo race on February 12 at $6.90. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run unplaced (25m) over 2700m at Lyon-la-Soie well beaten by Harlequin in 5-10yo handicap on January 19 at $128. Will find this a tough assignment; prefer later.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of six months. Finished off last campaign recording a big 9.5m win at Vincennes beating Krack Clea in 5-6yo race on October 14 at $3.20. Previous preparation first-up posted a big 4.1m win as favourite at Vincennes beating Klinger in 5-6yo gelding euro open on September 23 at $2.70. One of the key runners.

form.formComment: Good run 6 metres third behind Follia D'esi at Milan over 2100m 5yo+ G2 OPEN on February 22. Was disqualified last start on March 15 at Florence over 1600m 5yo+ G1 OPEN. Ignore last run and assess on its third two starts back; Worth another chance.
